name: zhao-lian-casefile
description: Static browser historical interactive narrative about the Zhao Lian casefile.

scripts.build: node scripts/compile-ink.mjs && node scripts/validate-content.mjs && node scripts/validate-history.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/check-performance.mjs
scripts.verify: prettier . --check && markdownlint "**/*.md" "!node_modules/**" "!dist/**" && eslint . && vitest run --coverage && vitest run tests/narrative && node scripts/validate-content.mjs && node scripts/validate-history.mjs && node scripts/compile-ink.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/check-performance.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e && playwright test tests/accessibility && node scripts/generate-attributions.mjs
